title: taraxacum croceum
intro: Taraxacum croceum, also known as the yellow dandelion or dandelion, is a perennial plant species in the sunflower family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve liver and kidney issues, and act as a natural diuretic. The health benefits of Taraxacum croceum include its antioxidant properties, anti-inflammatory effects, and ability to support immune function, which may help to lower blood pressure and improve overall well-being. Taraxacum croceum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
